title: Corrective fix for B-351c1115: Verify quiescence loop correctness
description:
Blocked reason: run.py:149 accesses args.max_cycles unconditionally. Pre-existing tests that construct Namespace(feature_root=..., max_workers=1) without max_cycles now fail with AttributeError. Fix: replace args.max_cycles with getattr(args, 'max_cycles', 50) on that line to match the defensive getattr pattern used for verbose on line 97.

Remaining work: Fix regression: src/agent_takt/cli/commands/run.py line 149 uses args.max_cycles directly. Pre-existing tests that pass Namespace without max_cycles now crash with AttributeError. Change to getattr(args, 'max_cycles', 50) — the same defensive pattern used for verbose on line 97.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-351c1115.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: None — only run.py line 149 needs changing; no overlap with other in-progress beads.
